user.title: Set up Dimsome
user.description: Create the Dimsome integration entry. Configure lights and schedules from the Dimsome sidebar panel.

abort.already_configured: Dimsome is already configured. Use the Dimsome sidebar panel to edit it.

resume.name: Resume
resume.description: Resume Dimsome control for all configured lights or the selected light entities.

entity_id.name: Light entities
entity_id.description: Only resume Dimsome control for these light entities. Leave empty to resume all configured lights.
